mapper.select: SELECT bk.id, bk.title, bk.author, bk.category_id, bk.main_category, bk.sub_category, bk.cover, rr.reading_status FROM user_shelf us LEFT JOIN reading_record rr ON us.user_id = rr.user_id AND us.book_id = rr.book_id LEFT JOIN book bk ON rr.book_id = bk.id WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY us.update_timestamp DESC
